title: croton zeylanicus
intro: Croton zeylanicus, also known as the Ceylon croton, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton zeylanicus include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. The plant is often used to prepare herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
